_comment: Approved YouTube live surf cams, embedded via the official youtube-nocookie player. Only streams with embedding enabled (videoEmbeddable/oEmbed-verified) belong here. Managed by scripts/youtube_cam_scan.py: 'scan' finds candidates, 'approve'/'reject' promote or dismiss them, 'verify' re-checks liveness and flips 'disabled' on dead streams. rejected_video_ids keeps dismissed candidates from being re-suggested.
